events.name: Memphis Grizzlies at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — The Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Memphis Grizzlies 131-80 in Game 1 of their first-round Western Conference <a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Thunder beat Grizzlies 131-80 in Game 1, 5th-biggest margin of victory in NBA postseason history

headlines.description: — As the Celtics were taking control of their playoff opener against the Orlando Magic, Boston’s best player was on his back in pain and tugging at his wrist.
headlines.shortLinkText: Derrick White scores 30, Tatum stays in game after fall and Celtics beat Magic 103-86 in Game 1

headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell quickly put any doubts to rest about whether his left ankle was 100% going into the playoffs for the Cleveland Cavaliers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mitchell, Jerome help Cavaliers rout Heat 121-100 in Game 1 of 1st-round series

events.name: Golden State Warriors at Houston Rockets

headlines.description: — Draymond Green easily boiled down the key to Golden State's victory over the Houston Rockets in Game 1 of the first-round playoff series Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stephen Curry scores 31 points in the Warriors' 95-85 victory over the Rockets 95-85 in Game 1
